title: Spicy Stew
description: A spicy fermented stew made with a variety of ingredients. Serve over rice or with some crusty bread.
instructions: Heat the stew in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the fermented ingredient and stir to combine.
Add the thick ingredient and stir to combine.
Pour in the Thai cola and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with crusty bread.
